opening_line: Meridian Logistics has raised some operational concerns that need our attention.
body_paragraph: The primary contact, James Okafor, has expressed issues regarding the efficiency of our current processes and the overall health of our collaboration. These concerns were discussed during our last interaction, and it appears that they may impact our ongoing relationship if not addressed promptly.
closing_line: We should consider scheduling a follow-up meeting with James to discuss these issues in more detail.
